parameters.query:
-- Find referrals that signed up 60+ days ago but haven't been qualified yet
SELECT
  r.id AS referral_id,
  r.referrer_organization_id,
  r.referee_organization_id,
  r.referral_code,
  r.signed_up_at,
  o.name AS referrer_name,
  ts.plan_id,
  bp.slug AS plan_slug
FROM referrals r
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = r.referrer_organization_id
LEFT JOIN tenant_subscriptions ts ON ts.organization_id = r.referrer_organization_id AND ts.status IN ('active', 'trialing')
LEFT JOIN billing_plans bp ON bp.id = ts.plan_id
WHERE r.status = 'signed_up'
  AND r.signed_up_at IS NOT NULL
  AND r.signed_up_at <= (NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days')
  AND r.referee_organization_id IS NOT NULL;

-- Issue referral credits
WITH credit_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO tenant_credits (organization_id, dimension, credits_purchased, credits_remaining, source, source_metadata, expires_at, status)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.referrer_organization_id }}',
    '{{ $json.dimension }}',
    {{ $json.quantity }},
    {{ $json.quantity }},
    'referral',
    '{"referral_id": "{{ $json.referral_id }}", "tier_label": "{{ $json.tier_label }}"}',
    (NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days'),
    'active'
  )
  RETURNING id
)
UPDATE referrals
SET status = 'rewarded',
    qualified_at = NOW(),
    reward_credit_id = (SELECT id FROM credit_insert)
WHERE id = '{{ $json.referral_id }}'
RETURNING id;
